items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Gucci Blondie Mini Bucket Bag. The Gucci Blondie series features a bold pattern paired with leather in matching tones, exuding a subtle and restrained atmosphere throughout. The series ingeniously incorporates circular geometric interlocking double G, showcasing Gucci's modern aesthetic design. Brand logo details add a unique charm to this black leather mini bucket bag adorned with tassel details. Black leather, taffeta lining, circular interlocking double G leather patch, leather tassel, top handle (8cm high), detachable chain shoulder strap (55cm high), drawstring closure.

Color: Black/Original Leather.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖[New] Mini Bucket Shoulder Bag. This mini bucket shoulder bag is crafted from blue leather. This accessory features a hook closure and a webbing shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality and modernity. Blue leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbing shoulder strap, cotton-linen blend lining, zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, shoulder strap (42cm high), hook closure.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖 [New] Classic GG Small Bucket Bag. A small bucket bag featuring the charm of the classic GG canvas. Deep brown leather trim and light gold-tone hardware enhance the charm of the beige and ebony pattern. An adjustable and detachable red and green striped webbing strap is threaded through the leather loops on the sides and fastened over the hardware rings, giving this bag more functionality and structure. Beige and ebony classic GG canvas, brown leather trim, light gold-tone hardware; cotton-linen blend lining, inside: 1 card pocket, detachable webbed shoulder strap (45cm high) hook closure, weight: approx. 0.35kg.

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖 [New] GG Super Mini Shoulder Bag. The initials of founder Guccio Gucci add a touch of elegance to the leather accessories, blending a modern small leather good with Gucci's deep design heritage. The textured and glossy classic GG pattern adds a unique touch to this elegant black mini shoulder bag. Black GG leather, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: 1 leather open pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (50cm high) magnetic snap closure.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Small Bucket Shoulder Bag. This small bucket shoulder bag is crafted in blue leather. This accessory features a hook closure and a webbing shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality and modernity. Blue leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbing strap, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: 2 main compartments and 1 zip pocket, with Gucci badge zip puller, adjustable shoulder strap (39.5cm high) Weight: approx. 0.9kg.
